creator: demon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Your patch will not work, because check_dns is not built without nslookup 
(and fresh FreeBSD-10 lacks nslookup in base). 

I see no way to depend on another port which provide nslookup 
(bindXX ports and bind-tools ports do, and they conflict to each other).
